metadata.description: Code quality and harness-engineering plugins for Cursor and Claude Code

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: feedback-blockers, reasoning-gaps, and setup commands for harness engineering. Analyze code for feedback-loop blockers, AI reasoning gaps, and set up the harness directory structure.

plugins.name: autonomous
plugins.description: An autonomous skill that drives a single issue/ticket link or plan file all the way to an opened pull request with no human in the loop.

plugins.name: linting-hooks
plugins.description: Post-edit hooks that auto-format .md files with Prettier + markdownlint and type-check .py files with pyright.

plugins.name: marketplace
plugins.description: Scaffold a plugin marketplace with proper structure, schema validation, and conventions. Includes update-cursor-plugins to copy a catalog into ~/.cursor/plugins/local as real files.

plugins.name: pyright
plugins.description: Run pyright on a Python codebase and fix its findings using a documented playbook of fix patterns.

plugins.name: codepath-visualizer
plugins.description: Map and visualize codepaths in any codebase as an interactive architecture diagram.

plugins.name: plan-keeper
plugins.description: Organize markdown plans in ~/plans/<repo>/. Save, route, archive, and optionally export to Linear/Jira.

plugins.name: update-git-repos
plugins.description: Pull every configured git repo from origin/<branch> in one shot.

plugins.name: yes-no-questions-hook
plugins.description: Reminds the agent to pose decision questions as numbered yes/no questions.

plugins.name: steelman
plugins.description: Argue the strongest good-faith case against the proposed changes in the current conversation or a named design/plan file.

plugins.name: pr-status-hook
plugins.description: Stop hook that reports PR / push / dirty-tree state at the end of every turn from real git/gh state.

plugins.name: wild-pr
plugins.description: Open a pull request with an architecture-first description (via its bundled summary-writer skill), review it, and babysit CI and review feedback. Ships /wild-pr:review for rubric-based code review, /wild-pr:babysit for single-pass tending, /wild-pr for create-then-babysit, and the summary-writer skill for architecture-first PR descriptions.

plugins.name: cleanup-worktrees
plugins.description: Reclaim disk space from stale git worktrees.
